title: Goethe-Zertifikat A1: Start Deutsch 1
description: Standard for spouse visas and basic communication.

structure.name: Hören
structure.description: Listen to short announcements and dialogues.

parts.title: Part 1: Short Dialogues
parts.description: 6 short conversations (MCQ, heard twice).

parts.title: Part 2: Announcements
parts.description: 4 announcements (True/False, heard once).

parts.title: Part 3: Telephone Messages
parts.description: 5 telephone messages (MCQ, heard twice).

parts.title: Part 1: Emails/Notes
parts.description: 2 short emails/notes (True/False or MCQ).

parts.title: Part 2: Advertisements
parts.description: Match 5 advertisements to situations.

parts.title: Part 3: Notices/Signs
parts.description: Read notices/signs (True/False).

parts.title: Part 1: Form Filling
parts.description: Fill out a form based on a short text (5 items).

parts.title: Part 2: Short Message
parts.description: Write a short personal email or note (approx. 30 words).

parts.title: Part 1: Self-Introduction
parts.description: Self-introduction (spell name, say number).

parts.title: Part 2: Information Exchange
parts.description: Ask/answer questions on a theme card.

parts.title: Part 3: Formulate Requests
parts.description: Formulate requests based on image cards.

tips: Arrive at least 15 minutes before the exam starts.
Know the exam format perfectly (number of parts, timing).
Practice with official model tests to build confidence.
Master time management: never leave a question blank.
Reading/Listening: Read questions/options before text/audio starts.
Writing: Use standard connectors (weil, obwohl, deshalb) as shortcuts.
Speaking: Clear communication is better than 100% perfect grammar.
Speaking: Use safe phrases (Redemittel) to stay fluent.

resources.title: Practice Materials
resources.description: Official sample practice materials for A1 exam

title: Goethe-Zertifikat A2
description: Basic language proficiency for daily life.

parts.title: Part 1: Blog Post/Article
parts.description: Read a blog post/article (5 MCQ).

parts.title: Part 2: Informative Text
parts.description: Read an informative text (e.g., schedule) and extract details.

parts.title: Part 3: Advertisements
parts.description: Match 5 situations with 7 advertisements.

parts.title: Part 4: Announcements
parts.description: Reading multiple announcements and choosing the right one.

parts.title: Part 1: Announcements/Messages
parts.description: 5 short announcements/messages (MCQ, heard twice).

parts.title: Part 2: Daily Activities
parts.description: A conversation about daily activities (Assignment task, heard once).

parts.title: Part 3: Private Conversation
parts.description: Private conversation (MCQ, heard once).

parts.title: Part 4: Radio Interview
parts.description: Interview on the radio (True/False, heard twice).

parts.title: Part 1: Daily Situation
parts.description: Write a message related to a situation (approx. 40 words).

parts.title: Part 2: Formal Message
parts.description: Answer a question or describe something (approx. 30 words).

parts.title: Part 1: Questions/Self-intro
parts.description: Ask/answer 4 personal questions based on prompt words.

parts.title: Part 2: Information on Topic
parts.description: Talk about something from your life based on a card.

parts.title: Part 3: Planning Activity
parts.description: Plan something together with your partner.

tips: Arrive at least 15 minutes before the exam starts.
Know the exam format perfectly (number of parts, timing).
Practice with official model tests to build confidence.
Master time management: never leave a question blank.
Reading/Listening: Read questions/options before text/audio starts.
Writing: Use standard connectors (weil, obwohl, deshalb) as shortcuts.
Speaking: Clear communication is better than 100% perfect grammar.
Speaking: Use safe phrases (Redemittel) to stay fluent.

resources.title: Practice Materials
resources.description: Official sample practice materials for A2 exam

title: Goethe-Zertifikat B1

parts.title: Part 1: Emails/Posts
parts.description: Read a personal blog/email (6 True/False).

parts.title: Part 2: Newspaper Articles
parts.description: Read newspaper articles (6 MCQ).

parts.title: Part 3: Advertisements
parts.description: Match 7 interest descriptions to 10 advertisements.

parts.title: Part 4: Guest Opinions
parts.description: Read comments on a topic and identify opinions (True/False).

parts.title: Part 5: Instructions/Rules
parts.description: Read rules/instructions and answer MCQ.

parts.title: Part 1: Short Messages
parts.description: 10 short announcements (True/False & MCQ, heard twice).

parts.title: Part 2: Presentation
parts.description: Guided tour or presentation (MCQ, heard once).

parts.title: Part 3: Private Talk
parts.description: Conversation between two people (True/False, heard once).

parts.title: Part 4: Radio Show
parts.description: Radio discussion with host and guests (MCQ, heard twice).

parts.title: Task 1: Personal Email
parts.description: Write a personal email (approx. 80 words).

parts.title: Task 2: Opinion Post
parts.description: Give your opinion on a forum topic (approx. 80 words).

parts.title: Task 3: Formal Message
parts.description: Formal email (40 words, e.g. apology).

parts.title: Part 1: Planning Activity
parts.description: Plan something together with a partner.

parts.title: Part 2: Presentation
parts.description: Give a short presentation about a topic.

parts.title: Part 3: Feedback/Questions
parts.description: Ask/answer questions about the presentations.

tips: Arrive at least 15 minutes before the exam starts.
Know the exam format perfectly (number of parts, timing).
Practice with official model tests to build confidence.
Master time management: never leave a question blank.
Reading/Listening: Read questions/options before text/audio starts.
Writing: Use standard connectors (weil, obwohl, deshalb) as shortcuts.
Speaking: Clear communication is better than 100% perfect grammar.
Speaking: Use safe phrases (Redemittel) to stay fluent.

resources.title: Practice Materials
resources.description: Official sample practice materials for B1 exam

title: Goethe-Zertifikat B2
description: Competent language skills for work and studies.

parts.title: Part 1: Opinions Matching
parts.description: Read forum posts and identify opinions (True/False).

parts.title: Part 2: Text Logic (Gaps)
parts.description: Insert missing sentences into a text.

parts.title: Part 3: Complex Article
parts.description: Read an analytical text and answer MCQ.

parts.title: Part 4: Situation Matching
parts.description: Match statements to texts (Search reading).

parts.title: Part 5: Rules/Regulations
parts.description: Read regulations/instructions and answer MCQ.

parts.title: Part 1: Short Audio Clips
parts.description: Understand short conversations/messages (True/False & MCQ).

parts.title: Part 2: Radio Interview
parts.description: Understand a longer talk about a topic (MCQ).

parts.title: Part 3: Discussion/Lecture
parts.description: Identify opinions in a discussion (Assignment task).

parts.title: Part 4: Expert Talk
parts.description: Understand a lecture or interview (MCQ).

parts.title: Task 1: Forum Post
parts.description: Write a post expressing your opinion (approx. 150 words).

parts.title: Task 2: Formal Message
parts.description: Write a formal message/email for information (approx. 100 words).

parts.title: Part 1: Oral Presentation
parts.description: Give a short presentation on a topic and answer questions.

parts.title: Part 2: Partner Discussion
parts.description: Discuss a topic with your partner, expressing and supporting opinions.

tips: Arrive at least 15 minutes before the exam starts.
Know the exam format perfectly (number of parts, timing).
Practice with official model tests to build confidence.
Master time management: never leave a question blank.
Reading/Listening: Read questions/options before text/audio starts.
Writing: Use standard connectors (weil, obwohl, deshalb) as shortcuts.
Speaking: Clear communication is better than 100% perfect grammar.
Speaking: Use safe phrases (Redemittel) to stay fluent.

resources.description: Official sample practice materials for B2 exam
